name: Navigate between revisions using the Select Part Revision dropdown
steps:
Given a part 'PCB Assembly' has revisions 'A' and 'B'
Given a user is logged in and on the part detail page for the revision 'A' of 'PCB Assembly'
When the user clicks the 'Select Part Revision' dropdown and selects revision 'B'
Then the browser navigates to the part detail page for revision 'B' of 'PCB Assembly'

name: Revision selector is not shown when only one revision exists
steps:
Given a part 'PCB Assembly' has only one revision 'PCB Assembly Rev A'
Given a user is logged in and on the part detail page for 'PCB Assembly Rev A'
When the user views the top of the part page
Then the 'Select Part Revision' dropdown is not displayed

name: Revision selector dropdown appears when multiple revisions exist
steps:
Given a part 'PCB Assembly' has two revisions: 'PCB Assembly Rev A' (revision 'A') and 'PCB Assembly Rev B' (revision 'B')
Given a user is logged in and on the part detail page for 'PCB Assembly Rev A'
When the user views the top of the part page
Then a 'Select Part Revision' dropdown is displayed allowing navigation between revisions
